title: Implement ProjectUpdater app from Claude Design mockup
description: Implement a working version of the 'Project Updater' personal project-tracker design imported via DesignSync from claude.ai/design/p/9e3f5e32-b481-4f33-8091-67f8b3456daf ('Project Updater.dc.html'). Build a self-contained client-side single-page app (no server) under Projects/ProjectUpdater/app/ combining the dark-theme visual design from the .dc.html mockup with the functional data model/logic from the companion prototype (uploads/project updater.txt, Google-Apps-Script-based), replacing google.script.run calls with a localStorage-backed store. Must implement all 4 views (Dashboard, Projects, Quick Note, Add Project), real stale/due-soon detection against actual dates, and persist data across reloads. Source design artifacts saved at Projects/ProjectUpdater/artifacts/design/. Project bootstrapped per NEW_PROJECT_WIZARD.md (shared/project-brief.md, requirements.md, unresolved-questions.md, risks/RISK_REGISTER.md all in place) - this is also the wizard's first real end-to-end validation, noted in RETROSPECTIVE_SYSTEM.md/HEALTH-0001 as previously untested.
acceptance_criteria: Projects/ProjectUpdater/app/index.html exists and implements Dashboard, Projects, Quick Note, and Add Project views matching the dark-theme visual design
Stale detection (daysIdle >= reminderDays) and due-soon detection (due within 7 days) compute against real current dates, not hardcoded sample values
Adding a project, saving a note, and marking a project visited all persist to localStorage and survive a page reload
App runs standalone by opening index.html in a browser with no server or build step
Manually exercised end-to-end per shared/requirements.md quality bar before submission
